name: BetaList
description: Pre-launch / beta directory for discovering and getting early adopters; great for waitlist building.

auth.notes: Email/password account. Submission is reviewed before going live; free queue is slow, paid is expedited.

best_practices: BetaList is for pre-launch startups — frame the product as early/upcoming and emphasise the waitlist or early-access angle.
Pitch must be a single, jargon-free sentence describing what it does and for whom.
Use a clean square logo (no text-heavy banners) — it renders small in the directory grid.
The description should focus on the problem and who it's for, not a feature dump.
Have a working landing page with an email capture before submitting; reviewers reject dead links.

questions.label: Pitch (one sentence)
questions.help: A single sentence: what it is and who it's for.

questions.label: Description
questions.help: Problem you solve and who it's for; keep it concrete.
